name: blackhole simulator
short_description: Start as a small black hole suck up the galaxy and evolve into the legendary black hole!
detailed_description:
Black hole simulator is an idle game, you start as a small black hole and grow and evolve as you collect upgrades.

-features

  • 3 tracks to listen to while you play

  • an idle collection system that earns you gold every few seconds

  • a in depth upgrade system featuring evolutions.

  • in game achievements that give you rewards and steam acheivements

  • 8 different evolutions pre galaxy sized update 16 different evolutions post galaxy sized update

  • perk system that can also aid you in your destruction

  • 4 pets currently in the game

  • threat level increases based on total kill count gain passive ability's over time

  • planetary system which also give you perks, buffs, and more enemies.

  • a hard mode enemy system which helps you progress the game faster.

  • multiple different levels taking you to different space biomes

  • save system that will save your total gold and your threat level

  • respec by saving and restarting your game. If you dont like your black hole you can always try a different one.

  • galaxy sized update- on may 14th I will be dropping the galaxy sized update which will add 8 new evolutions showcased in the new trailer. It will also add additional levels and the quest system!

So how about it you ready to suck up the galaxy!
